creator: ngie@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Carlo Strub from comment #2)
> Is this PR still relevant?

Yup. The repro still causes portmaster to bomb out later than desired :/.

A simple conditional early on should be ok:

if ! (cd $PORTSDIR && `make -VSU_CMD` "true"); then
    echo "Please run portmaster as root/a user with sufficient privileges"
    exit 1
fi
